{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1264 clarifies that a simultaneous video visit is not a requirement for telehealth prescribing if the alternative process is consistent with the accepted standard of care.",
    "Doctors have found that the barrier to care requiring a live video-conference for birth control is medically unnecessary.",
    "Planned Parenthood's PPDirect expands access to birth control by prescribing contraceptives via a smartphone app.",
    "It is estimated that half of patients do not fulfill the requirement of a live video-conference and are thus ineligible to receive contraception.",
    "New technologies make it easier to provide access to healthcare."
  ]
}
